name: ExtensionCapabilityStatement_Rest_Resource_Type
title: R5: type additional codes
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `CapabilityStatement.rest.resource.type` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`CapabilityStatement.rest.resource.type` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `CapabilityStatement.rest.resource.type` 1..1 `code`
*  R4B: `CapabilityStatement.rest.resource.type` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `CapabilityStatement.rest.resource.type` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `CapabilityStatement.rest.resource.type` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `CapabilityStatement.rest.resource.type` as `RelatedTo`.
The mappings for `CapabilityStatement.rest.resource.type` do not allow expression of the necessary codes, per the bindings on the source and target.

element.comment:
Element `CapabilityStatement.rest.resource.type` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `CapabilityStatement.rest.resource.type` as `RelatedTo`.
The mappings for `CapabilityStatement.rest.resource.type` do not allow expression of the necessary codes, per the bindings on the source and target.

element.short: A resource type that is supported
element.definition: A type of resource exposed via the restful interface.

binding.description: One of the resource types defined as part of this version of FHIR.
